title: SushiSwap - REKT
relevance_summary: UniswapV3 callback manipulation leading to token draining from approved addresses

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls processRoute() without proper validation of pool deployer
prevention.trigger: processRoute() called without checking pool deployer

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls processRoute() without proper validation of pool deployer
summary: An attacker exploited a vulnerability in SushiSwap's RouteProcessor2 contract by creating a fake UniswapV3 pool and draining tokens from approved addresses. This could have been prevented by properly validating the pool deployer before processing routes.
